primary_variables.matched_definition: Exposure involving active infection by virus, bacteria, fungus, or parasite.
evidence: PKR was immunoprecipitated from HeLa cells that were either mock-infected or infected with a TMEV strain expressing a mutant L protein (LM60V)

Immunoprecipitated samples, collected after 10 h of infection, were resolved by SDS-PAGE and Coomassie blue-stained bands around 70Kda (expected molecular weight for PKR) were analyzed by mass spectrometry

matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: To test whether Ser6 phosphorylation was mediated by PKR itself or by another cellular kinase, a similar mass spectrometry analysis was performed after PKR immunoprecipitation from PKR-KO HeLa cells transduced with the lentiviral vector TC27 that expresses a kinase-dead PKR mutant (K296R)

attributes.agent: TMEV strain expressing a mutant L protein (LM60V)
evidence: PKR was immunoprecipitated from HeLa cells that were either mock-infected or infected with a TMEV strain expressing a mutant L protein (LM60V)
Immunoprecipitated samples, collected after 10 h of infection
For infection, the virus was diluted in serum-free medium and used at a multiplicity of infection (MOI) of 5 PFU/cell.
a similar mass spectrometry analysis was performed after PKR immunoprecipitation from PKR-KO HeLa cells transduced with the lentiviral vector TC27 that expresses a kinase-dead PKR mutant (K296R)

case_arms: infected with a TMEV strain expressing a mutant L protein (LM60V)

evidence: PKR was immunoprecipitated from HeLa cells that were either mock-infected or infected with a TMEV strain expressing a mutant L protein (LM60V)

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment uses DDA (Orbitrap Fusion Lumos) and gel-based excision of a specific protein band (PKR), which is a standard bottom-up approach. While PRIDE mentions 'spectrum counting', the primary goal is site mapping via SequestHT.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study specifically aims to identify and map novel phosphorylation sites (Ser6, Ser97) using dynamic modifications for phosphorylated Ser, Thr, and Tyr.
